---

## Overview

> Cloud-synced attendance with anti-spoofing and live detection.

**AI Attendance System v2** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with OpenCV, TensorFlow.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Image Frames"| CV["Computer Vision<br/>OpenCV"];
    CV -->|"Feature Maps"| D;
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"TensorFlow Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#0d001a,stroke:#bc8cff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#15002d,stroke:#bc8cff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#0d001a,stroke:#bc8cff,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#15002d,stroke:#bc8cff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#1f0045,stroke:#bc8cff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
AI-Attendance-System-v2/
  .DS_Store
  LICENSE
  README.md
  .vscode/
    settings.json
  __pycache__/
    main.cpython-39.pyc
  data/
    .DS_Store
    .reload_notification
  models/
  sounds/
  src/
  venv/
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Python` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `7399` |
| **Frameworks** | `OpenCV`, `TensorFlow` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>scikit-learn</code>  <code>tensorflow</code>  <code>numba</code>  <code>pygame</code>  <code>requests</code>  <code>imageio</code>  <code>pandas</code>  <code>scipy</code>  <code>matplotlib</code>  <code>keras</code>  <code>numpy</code>  <code>face-recognition</code>  <code>flake8</code>  <code>python-dateutil</code>  <code>imageio-ffmpeg</code>
</p>
